name: cli-builder
description: CLI tool builder for TypeScript — interactive scaffolding and command template generation following modern ESM conventions

skills.name: cli-create
skills.description: Interactive TypeScript CLI project creation — supports monorepo and simple structures with Commander, Zod, Chalk, and full tooling

skills.name: cli-add-command
skills.description: Command template generation — creates individual command files with Commander definition, Zod validation, Chalk output, barrel exports, and test stubs
